prompt: Aerial top-down view of a snowy mountain landscape with two distinct human walking paths in deep snow. On the left: a highly chaotic, deeply carved footprint path zigzagging and looping around every small obstacle. On the right: a clean, mostly straight human footprint path cutting directly through open snow. Photorealistic aerial photograph, natural winter sunlight, cinematic quality, no text, no labels.
metaphor: A chaotic footprint trail that loops around every pebble and shrub represents noise-fitting; the clean straight trail alongside it represents true generalization.
